assertions.description: The PCB has footprints with designators I, II, RUN, SEL (used as physical labels for buttons instead of SW_N). The PCB analyzer correctly lists them as footprints and includes them in component_groups. This is unusual design practice but handled correctly.

assertions.description: U2 SN74HC163N has pins A(3), B(4), C(5), D(6) all tied to GND, meaning the counter always loads 0. This is a valid functional choice for a counter that only counts, but is worth noting. The PCB pad_nets show this correctly but no design_observation flags it.
